data.additionalText: Creative Designer | Web Developer | Data Analyst

texts: I design visuals, build websites, and analyzes data.
A creative developer based in Indonesia.

About.title: About Me
About.description: I'm a Developer and a Designer who loves to design, develop websites, and analyze data. I enjoy creating visually appealing websites and digital experiences while using data to guide smarter decisions. Whether I'm building a web application, designing an interface, analysing datasets, or creating 3D visuals, my goal is the same: make things that look good and also work well.

projects.title: Sales Data Analysis
projects.description: An analysis of sales data to identify trends and opportunities.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website to showcase my projects and skills.

projects.title: E-Kesiswaan
projects.description: A web-based student management system designed to streamline administrative tasks and enhance communication between students, teachers, and staff.

projects.title: BeatIT - IOT Smart Power Cord
projects.description: A Smart Extension Cord that can be controlled from your phone

projects.title: Exposia
projects.description: Build a landing page in minutes. Build a beautiful and functional landing page in a modular way.

skillCard.title: Data Analysis
skillCard.description: Transforming raw information into meaningful, data-driven insights. I specialize in identifying key trends and patterns through structured analysis, helping to simplify complex datasets into clear narratives that support better decision-making and strategic planning.

skillCard.title: Design
skillCard.description: Building modern, responsive, and high-performance web applications. I am dedicated to writing clean, maintainable code and developing seamless user experiences that are optimized for speed, accessibility, and growth across all devices.

skillCard.title: Web Development
skillCard.description: Creating impactful visual identities and user-centered interfaces. I focus on translating complex ideas into clear, engaging designs that prioritize both aesthetics and functionality, ensuring a consistent and professional look across all digital and print platforms.

experiences.title: Web Developer Intern
experiences.description: As a Web Developer Intern, I contributed to the development and maintenance of web applications, gaining hands-on experience in both frontend and backend technologies.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained web application features across frontend and backend using Next.js/React and Laravel.
Built responsive UI components and integrated them with REST APIs to improve usability and performance.
Implemented backend functionality including authentication, CRUD operations, and database management.
Collaborated with the team using Asana for task tracking, sprint planning, and progress reporting.

experiences.title: 4th Place Finalist - Infinitera 1.0 Web Programming Competition
experiences.description: Participated in Infinitera 1.0, a national-level Web Programming Competition organized by HMTIF Unissula, and successfully advanced to the final round, securing 4th place.
responsibilities: Applying design into code to create a functional and visually appealing web application.
Collaborating with a team to brainstorm, plan, and execute the project within the competition's timeframe.
Utilizing web development technologies to build a responsive and user-friendly application.

experiences.title: Event Commitee
experiences.description: In AGS (Amikom Goes to School) 2025, I served as an Event Committee member, contributing to the planning and execution of the event.
responsibilities: Contributed to the pre-planning phase, ensuring smooth event execution.
Managed event flow and ensured adherence to the official rundown.
Coordinated with the Documentation and Design Committee to align event materials and visuals.
Collaborated with the Equipment Committee to organize prizes and merchandise.
Assisted the Scientific Committee in facilitating participant engagement during the event workshop.

experiences.title: Computer Lab Assistant
experiences.description: As a Lab Computer Assistant and Assistant Coordinator, I support both technical operations and team coordination within the course environment.
responsibilities: Coordinated the schedules of fellow lab assistants to ensure full coverage and smooth class sessions.
Acted as a communication bridge between students and the lecturer, relaying feedback and announcements efficiently.
Provided one-on-one and group guidance to students regarding coursework, debugging, and lab exercises.
Took initiative to assist and manage student questions during the professor’s absence.
Ensured lab sessions ran smoothly by addressing technical issues and maintaining classroom order.

Contacts.title: Let's Connect
Contacts.quotes: Feel free to reach out for collaborations, inquiries, or just to say hi!
